```{r 10.2. ss_cab_fit1 STAR comparisons full extrapolation, cache = T}
# CCF: Restricted larval index vs. SSB
ccf(ss_full_combined_obs$larvae_index, ss_full_combined_obs$ssb,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Spawning Stock Biomass (raw)")

larvae_detrended <- residuals(loess(larvae_index ~ year, data = ss_full_combined_obs, span = 0.75))
ssb_detrended    <- residuals(loess(ssb ~ year,          data = ss_full_combined_obs, span = 0.75))

ccf(larvae_detrended, ssb_detrended, 
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. SSB (detrended)")
```

```{r 10.2.2. ss_cab_fit1 STAR comparisons station extrapolation, cache = T}
#---- 10.2. ss_cab_fit1 STAR comparisons and CCF

# Create one data frame to house all STAR + larval index data
# Note! For these comparisons, we move forward with the constrained 10.1.f. abundance index, assuming it's more stable.
ss_full_combined <- ss_full_cab_index_obs %>%
  dplyr::select(year, est) %>%
  rename(larvae_index = est) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_SSB %>% rename(ssb = value, ssb_lo = lo, ssb_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_recdevs %>% rename(rec_dev = value, rec_dev_lo = lo, rec_dev_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_age0 %>% rename(age0 = value, age0_lo = lo, age0_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  )

# Filter to observed years
ss_full_combined_obs <- ss_full_combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(larvae_index))

# CCF: Restricted larval index vs. age-0 recruits
ccf(ss_full_combined_obs$larvae_index, ss_full_combined_obs$age0,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Age-0 Recruits")

# CCF: Restricted larval index vs. recruitment deviations
ccf(ss_full_combined_obs$larvae_index, ss_full_combined_obs$rec_dev,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Recruitment Deviations")

# Nothing really :( when we try against SSB, we get some strong signal, but this is probably due to a shared declining trend. We'll try to parse that.
# CCF: Restricted larval index vs. SSB
ccf(ss_full_combined_obs$larvae_index, ss_full_combined_obs$ssb,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Spawning Stock Biomass (raw)")

larvae_detrended <- residuals(loess(larvae_index ~ year, data = ss_full_combined_obs, span = 0.75))
ssb_detrended    <- residuals(loess(ssb ~ year,          data = ss_full_combined_obs, span = 0.75))

ccf(larvae_detrended, ssb_detrended, 
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. SSB (detrended)")
```

## 10.3. ss_cab_fit1 — Correlation Testing

```{r 10.3. ss_cab_fit1 correlation testing, cache = T}
# RQ residuals for full AR1 spatiotemporal model
ss_full_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  mutate(med_resid = median(rq_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = rq_resid)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.6, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(x = as.numeric(factor(year)), y = rq_resid),
    method  = "loess", span = 0.4,
    se      = TRUE, color = "firebrick", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "RQ Residual",
    title = "Annual RQ Residual Distributions — cab_fit1"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 7))

ss_full_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(cusum = cumsum(med_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = cusum)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  labs(
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "Cumulative Sum of Median RQ Residual",
    title = "CUSUM — cab_fit1"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


#---- Simple lagged regression at -1 to check

ss_full_combined_lagged <- ss_full_combined_obs %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    age0_lead1 = lead(age0, 1),
    rec_dev_lead1 = lead(rec_dev, 1)
  )

ss_full_lm_age0 <- lm(age0_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = ss_full_combined_lagged)
ss_full_lm_recdev <- lm(rec_dev_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = ss_full_combined_lagged)

summary(ss_full_lm_age0)
summary(ss_full_lm_recdev)

ss_full_combined_lagged %>%
  filter(!is.na(age0_lead1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = larvae_index, y = age0_lead1, label = year)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(nudge_y = 8, size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = T) +
  labs(x = "Larval Index (year t)", y = "Age-0 Recruits (year t+1)") +
  theme_minimal()

ss_full_combined_lagged_no83 <- ss_full_combined_lagged %>% filter(year != 1983)

ss_full_lm_age0_no83 <- lm(age0_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = ss_full_combined_lagged_no83)
summary(ss_full_lm_age0_no83)

ss_full_lm_age0_detrend   <- lm(age0_lead1    ~ larvae_index + year, data = ss_full_combined_lagged)
ss_full_lm_recdev_detrend <- lm(rec_dev_lead1 ~ larvae_index + year, data = ss_full_combined_lagged)

summary(ss_full_lm_age0_detrend)
summary(ss_full_lm_recdev_detrend)

plot(ss_full_lm_age0, which = 4)  # Cook's distance plot

# Remove the three most anomalous years
ss_full_combined_lagged_trimmed <- ss_full_combined_lagged %>% 
  filter(!year %in% c(1983, 1986, 1998))

ss_full_combined_lagged_trimmed %>%
  filter(!is.na(age0_lead1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = larvae_index, y = age0_lead1, label = year)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(nudge_y = 8, size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = T) +
  labs(x = "Larval Index (year t)", y = "Age-0 Recruits (year t+1)") +
  theme_minimal()

ss_full_lm_age0_trimmed <- lm(age0_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = ss_full_combined_lagged_trimmed)
summary(ss_full_lm_age0_trimmed)

ss_full_lm_age0_trimmed_detrend <- lm(age0_lead1 ~ larvae_index + year, data = ss_full_combined_lagged_trimmed)
summary(ss_full_lm_age0_trimmed_detrend)


# 1. Is the underprediction concentrated in one delta component?
# Separate RQ residuals by model component
ss_full_pred_obs <- ss_full_pred_obs %>%
  mutate(
    rq_resid1 = residuals(ss_cab_fit1, model = 1, type = "mle-mvn"),
    rq_resid2 = residuals(ss_cab_fit1, model = 2, type = "mle-mvn")
  )

# CUSUM for each component separately
ss_full_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    med_resid1 = median(rq_resid1, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_resid2 = median(rq_resid2, na.rm = TRUE),  # positive tows only
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    cusum1 = cumsum(replace_na(med_resid1, 0)),
    cusum2 = cumsum(replace_na(med_resid2, 0))
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(cusum1, cusum2),
               names_to = "component",
               values_to = "cusum") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = cusum, color = component)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("cusum1" = "steelblue", "cusum2" = "firebrick"),
                     labels = c("Delta (binomial)", "Gamma")) +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "CUSUM", title = "CUSUM by Delta Model Component — ss_cab_fit1") +
  theme_minimal()

# 2. Is the underprediction spatially structured?
ss_full_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(station) %>%
  summarise(mean_resid = mean(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = station, y = mean_resid)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "Station", y = "Mean RQ Residual",
       title = "Mean Residual by Station — ss_cab_fit1") +
  theme_minimal()

# 3. AIC comparison: ss_cab_fit1 vs. ss_cab_fit1c (Gamma AR1 only)
AIC(ss_cab_fit1, ss_cab_fit1c)

#---- Breakpoint analysis: ss_cab_fit1 (constrained, AR1 spatiotemporal) ----

# ── Build annual median residual series ──

# Combined (overall)
ss_fit1_cusum <- ss_full_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year)

# Component-level
ss_fit1_cusum_components <- ss_full_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    med_resid1 = median(rq_resid1, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_resid2 = median(rq_resid2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

# ── Segmented regression: combined CUSUM — one breakpoint ──
lm_ss_fit1       <- lm(med_resid ~ year, data = ss_fit1_cusum)
seg_ss_fit1      <- segmented(lm_ss_fit1, seg.Z = ~year, npsi = 1)
summary(seg_ss_fit1)
confint(seg_ss_fit1)

# ── Segmented regression: Gamma component — one breakpoint ──
# Gamma is the dominant signal; focus breakpoint search here
lm_ss_fit1_gamma  <- lm(med_resid2 ~ year, data = ss_fit1_cusum_components)
seg_ss_fit1_gamma <- segmented(lm_ss_fit1_gamma, seg.Z = ~year, npsi = 1)
summary(seg_ss_fit1_gamma)
confint(seg_ss_fit1_gamma)

# ── Segmented regression: Gamma component — two breakpoints ──
# Try two in case the early 1987-88 peak and mid-1990s descent are distinct
seg_ss_fit1_gamma2 <- segmented(lm_ss_fit1_gamma, seg.Z = ~year, npsi = 2)
summary(seg_ss_fit1_gamma2)
confint(seg_ss_fit1_gamma2)

run_era_ccf <- function(df, ss_var, start_yr, end_yr, lag.max = 10) {
  sub <- df %>% filter(year >= start_yr, year <= end_yr) %>% arrange(year)
  cat("Era:", start_yr, "–", end_yr, "| n rows:", nrow(sub), "\n")
  print(sub %>% dplyr::select(year, larvae_index, all_of(ss_var)))
  ccf(sub$larvae_index, sub[[ss_var]], lag.max = lag.max,
      main = paste0("CCF: ", start_yr, "–", end_yr, " | ", ss_var))
}

# ── Extract breakpoints and run era-stratified CCFs ──
bp_ss_fit1 <- round(seg_ss_fit1$psi[, "Est."])
bp_ss_fit1_gamma <- round(seg_ss_fit1_gamma$psi[, "Est."])

cat("Combined CUSUM breakpoint:", bp_ss_fit1, "\n")
cat("Gamma CUSUM breakpoint:", bp_ss_fit1_gamma, "\n")

# Era-stratified CCFs using combined breakpoint
# Two eras defined by single breakpoint
run_era_ccf(ss_full_combined_obs, "age0",    1981, bp_ss_fit1 - 1)
run_era_ccf(ss_full_combined_obs, "age0",    bp_ss_fit1, 2015)

run_era_ccf(ss_full_combined_obs, "rec_dev", 1981, bp_ss_fit1 - 1)
run_era_ccf(ss_full_combined_obs, "rec_dev", bp_ss_fit1, 2015)

# Era-stratified CCFs using Gamma breakpoint
run_era_ccf(ss_full_combined_obs, "age0",    1981, bp_ss_fit1_gamma - 1)
run_era_ccf(ss_full_combined_obs, "age0",    bp_ss_fit1_gamma, 2015)

run_era_ccf(ss_full_combined_obs, "rec_dev", 1981, bp_ss_fit1_gamma - 1)
run_era_ccf(ss_full_combined_obs, "rec_dev", bp_ss_fit1_gamma, 2015)
```

## 10.4. ss_cab_fit01 — Fixed Year Effects Delta-Gamma Model

```{r 10.4. ss_cab_fit01 diagnostics, cache = T}

#---- 10.4.a. Calibration summaries

ss_fy_pred_obs <- predict(ss_cab_fit01, type = "response")

# Overall mean calibration
ss_fy_pred_obs %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean     = mean(larvae_100m3, na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_mean    = mean(est, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs_occ      = mean(larvae_100m3 > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_occ     = mean(est1, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs_pos_mean = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_pos_mean = mean(est2, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Binomial calibration
ss_fy_pred_obs$presence <- ss_fy_pred_obs$larvae_100m3 > 0

ss_fy_calibration_summary <- ss_fy_pred_obs %>%
  mutate(prob_bin = cut(est1, breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1))) %>%
  group_by(prob_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred = mean(est1),
    observed  = mean(presence),
    n         = n()
  )

plot(ss_fy_calibration_summary$mean_pred, ss_fy_calibration_summary$observed,
     xlab = "Predicted presence probability",
     ylab = "Observed presence frequency")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

#---- 10.4.b. Predicted vs. observed plots

# Raw scale
plot(
  x = ss_fy_pred_obs$est,
  y = cabezon_shelf_spawn$larvae_100m3,
  xlab = "Predicted",
  ylab = "Observed"
)
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# Log scale
plot(log1p(ss_fy_pred_obs$est), log1p(cabezon_shelf_spawn$larvae_100m3),
     xlab = "log(Predicted + 1)", ylab = "log(Observed + 1)")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# Gamma (positive density) component only
pos_idx <- cabezon_shelf_spawn$larvae_100m3 > 0
plot(log(ss_fy_pred_obs$est2[pos_idx]), log(cabezon_shelf_spawn$larvae_100m3[pos_idx]),
     xlab = "log(Predicted positive abundance)",
     ylab = "log(Observed positive abundance)")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

#---- 10.4.c. Randomized quantile residuals

ss_fy_rq_res <- residuals(ss_cab_fit01, type = "mle-mvn")

# QQ plot
qqnorm(ss_fy_rq_res)
qqline(ss_fy_rq_res)

# Spatial residual map by year
ss_fy_pred_obs$rq_resid <- ss_fy_rq_res

ggplot(ss_fy_pred_obs, aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, color = rq_resid)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient2() +
  facet_wrap(~ year)

#---- 10.4.d. Temporal calibration

ss_fy_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    obs  = mean(larvae_100m3),
    pred = mean(est)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = obs),  color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred), color = "blue", linetype = "dashed")

#---- 10.4.e. Abundance index: regular spatial grid

ss_fy_pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  X = seq(min(cabezon_shelf_spawn$X), max(cabezon_shelf_spawn$X), by = 5),
  Y = seq(min(cabezon_shelf_spawn$Y), max(cabezon_shelf_spawn$Y), by = 5)
) %>%
  tidyr::crossing(year = as.integer(sort(unique(cabezon_shelf_spawn$year)))) %>%
  mutate(fyear = as.factor(year))

ss_fy_cab_map   <- predict(ss_cab_fit01, newdata = ss_fy_pred_grid, return_tmb_object = TRUE)
ss_fy_cab_index <- get_index(ss_fy_cab_map, area = 5^2, bias_correct = TRUE)

ggplot(ss_fy_cab_index, aes(x = year, y = est)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(y = "Estimated abundance index", x = "Year",
       title = "Abundance Index: Constrained to Spawning Season & Coastal Samples")

#---- 10.4.f. Abundance index: observed station grid (preferred)

ss_fy_pred_grid_obs <- cabezon_shelf_spawn %>%
  dplyr::select(X, Y, year, fyear) %>%
  distinct()

ss_fy_cab_map_obs   <- predict(ss_cab_fit01,
                               newdata = ss_fy_pred_grid_obs,
                               return_tmb_object = TRUE)

ss_fy_cab_index_obs <- get_index(ss_fy_cab_map_obs,
                                 area = 5^2,
                                 bias_correct = TRUE)

ggplot(ss_fy_cab_index_obs, aes(x = year, y = est)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(y = "Estimated abundance index", x = "Year",
       title = "Abundance Index: Observed Station Grid")

```

## 10.5. ss_cab_fit01 — STAR Comparisons & CCFs

```{r 10.5. ss_cab_fit01 STAR comparisons full extrapolation, cache = T}

#---- 10.5. ss_cab_fit01 STAR comparisons and CCF

# Create one data frame to house all STAR + larval index data
# Note! For these comparisons, we move forward with the constrained 10.4.f. abundance index, assuming it's more stable.
ss_fy_combined <- ss_fy_cab_index %>%
  dplyr::select(year, est) %>%
  rename(larvae_index = est) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_SSB %>% rename(ssb = value, ssb_lo = lo, ssb_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_recdevs %>% rename(rec_dev = value, rec_dev_lo = lo, rec_dev_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_age0 %>% rename(age0 = value, age0_lo = lo, age0_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  )

# Filter to observed years
ss_fy_combined_obs <- ss_fy_combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(larvae_index))

# CCF: Restricted larval index vs. age-0 recruits
ccf(ss_fy_combined_obs$larvae_index, ss_fy_combined_obs$age0,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Age-0 Recruits")

# CCF: Restricted larval index vs. recruitment deviations
ccf(ss_fy_combined_obs$larvae_index, ss_fy_combined_obs$rec_dev,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Recruitment Deviations")

# Nothing really :( when we try against SSB, we get some strong signal, but this is probably due to a shared declining trend. We'll try to parse that.
# CCF: Restricted larval index vs. SSB
ccf(ss_fy_combined_obs$larvae_index, ss_fy_combined_obs$ssb,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Spawning Stock Biomass (raw)")

ss_fy_larvae_detrended <- residuals(loess(larvae_index ~ year, data = ss_fy_combined_obs, span = 0.75))
ss_fy_ssb_detrended    <- residuals(loess(ssb ~ year,          data = ss_fy_combined_obs, span = 0.75))

ccf(ss_fy_larvae_detrended, ss_fy_ssb_detrended, 
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. SSB (detrended)")

```

```{r 10.5.2. ss_cab_fit01 STAR comparisons station extrapolation, cache = T}

#---- 10.5. ss_cab_fit01 STAR comparisons and CCF

# Create one data frame to house all STAR + larval index data
# Note! For these comparisons, we move forward with the constrained 10.4.f. abundance index, assuming it's more stable.
ss_fy_combined <- ss_fy_cab_index_obs %>%
  dplyr::select(year, est) %>%
  rename(larvae_index = est) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_SSB %>% rename(ssb = value, ssb_lo = lo, ssb_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_recdevs %>% rename(rec_dev = value, rec_dev_lo = lo, rec_dev_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_age0 %>% rename(age0 = value, age0_lo = lo, age0_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  )

# Filter to observed years
ss_fy_combined_obs <- ss_fy_combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(larvae_index))

# CCF: Restricted larval index vs. age-0 recruits
ccf(ss_fy_combined_obs$larvae_index, ss_fy_combined_obs$age0,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Age-0 Recruits")

# CCF: Restricted larval index vs. recruitment deviations
ccf(ss_fy_combined_obs$larvae_index, ss_fy_combined_obs$rec_dev,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Recruitment Deviations")

# Nothing really :( when we try against SSB, we get some strong signal, but this is probably due to a shared declining trend. We'll try to parse that.
# CCF: Restricted larval index vs. SSB
ccf(ss_fy_combined_obs$larvae_index, ss_fy_combined_obs$ssb,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Spawning Stock Biomass (raw)")

ss_fy_larvae_detrended <- residuals(loess(larvae_index ~ year, data = ss_fy_combined_obs, span = 0.75))
ss_fy_ssb_detrended    <- residuals(loess(ssb ~ year,          data = ss_fy_combined_obs, span = 0.75))

ccf(ss_fy_larvae_detrended, ss_fy_ssb_detrended, 
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. SSB (detrended)")

```

## 10.6. ss_cab_fit01 — Correlation Testing

```{r 10.6. ss_cab_fit01 correlation testing, cache = T}
# RQ residuals for fixed year effect + IID model
ss_fy_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  mutate(med_resid = median(rq_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = rq_resid)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.6, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(x = as.numeric(factor(year)), y = rq_resid),
    method  = "loess", span = 0.4,
    se      = TRUE, color = "firebrick", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "RQ Residual",
    title = "Annual RQ Residual Distributions — ss_cab_fit01"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 7))

ss_fy_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(cusum = cumsum(med_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = cusum)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  labs(
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "Cumulative Sum of Median RQ Residual",
    title = "CUSUM — ss_cab_fit01"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#---- Simple lagged regression at lag -1

ss_fy_combined_lagged <- ss_fy_combined_obs %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    age0_lead1    = lead(age0, 1),
    rec_dev_lead1 = lead(rec_dev, 1)
  )

ss_fy_lm_age0   <- lm(age0_lead1    ~ larvae_index, data = ss_fy_combined_lagged)
ss_fy_lm_recdev <- lm(rec_dev_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = ss_fy_combined_lagged)

summary(ss_fy_lm_age0)
summary(ss_fy_lm_recdev)

ss_fy_combined_lagged %>%
  filter(!is.na(age0_lead1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = larvae_index, y = age0_lead1, label = year)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(nudge_y = 8, size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "Larval Index (year t)", y = "Age-0 Recruits (year t+1)") +
  theme_minimal()

# Sensitivity: remove 1983
ss_fy_combined_lagged_no83 <- ss_fy_combined_lagged %>% filter(year != 1983)
ss_fy_lm_age0_no83 <- lm(age0_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = ss_fy_combined_lagged_no83)
summary(ss_fy_lm_age0_no83)

# Detrended regressions
ss_fy_lm_age0_detrend   <- lm(age0_lead1    ~ larvae_index + year, data = ss_fy_combined_lagged)
ss_fy_lm_recdev_detrend <- lm(rec_dev_lead1 ~ larvae_index + year, data = ss_fy_combined_lagged)
summary(ss_fy_lm_age0_detrend)
summary(ss_fy_lm_recdev_detrend)

# Cook's distance
plot(ss_fy_lm_age0, which = 4)

# Trimmed analysis: remove three most anomalous years
ss_fy_combined_lagged_trimmed <- ss_fy_combined_lagged %>%
  filter(!year %in% c(1983, 1986, 1998))

ss_fy_combined_lagged_trimmed %>%
  filter(!is.na(age0_lead1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = larvae_index, y = age0_lead1, label = year)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(nudge_y = 8, size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "Larval Index (year t)", y = "Age-0 Recruits (year t+1)") +
  theme_minimal()

ss_fy_lm_age0_trimmed <- lm(age0_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = ss_fy_combined_lagged_trimmed)
summary(ss_fy_lm_age0_trimmed)

ss_fy_lm_age0_trimmed_detrend <- lm(age0_lead1 ~ larvae_index + year, data = ss_fy_combined_lagged_trimmed)
summary(ss_fy_lm_age0_trimmed_detrend)

# 1. Is the underprediction concentrated in one delta component?
ss_fy_pred_obs <- ss_fy_pred_obs %>%
  mutate(
    rq_resid1 = residuals(ss_cab_fit01, model = 1, type = "mle-mvn"),
    rq_resid2 = residuals(ss_cab_fit01, model = 2, type = "mle-mvn")
  )

ss_fy_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    med_resid1 = median(rq_resid1, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_resid2 = median(rq_resid2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    cusum1 = cumsum(replace_na(med_resid1, 0)),
    cusum2 = cumsum(replace_na(med_resid2, 0))
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(cusum1, cusum2),
               names_to  = "component",
               values_to = "cusum") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = cusum, color = component)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("cusum1" = "steelblue", "cusum2" = "firebrick"),
                     labels = c("cusum1" = "Delta (binomial)", "cusum2" = "Gamma")) +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "CUSUM",
       title = "CUSUM by Delta Model Component — ss_cab_fit01") +
  theme_minimal()

# 2. Is the underprediction spatially structured?
ss_fy_pred_obs %>%
  group_by(station) %>%
  summarise(mean_resid = mean(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = station, y = mean_resid)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "Station", y = "Mean RQ Residual",
       title = "Mean Residual by Station — ss_cab_fit01") +
  theme_minimal()

# 3. AIC comparison: AR1 vs. fixed year effect (constrained dataset)
AIC(ss_cab_fit01, ss_cab_fit1, ss_cab_fit1c)



```



---

# PART III — APPENDIX / ADDITIONAL MODELS

---

# A1. TWEEDIE MODEL — cab_fit2

```{r A1. cab_fit2 Tweedie, eval = F}
#---- A1. cab_fit2 Tweedie — Diagnostics & Abundance Index
#---- A1.a. Calibration summaries
pred_obs_tw <- predict(cab_fit2, type = "response")

pred_obs_tw %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean  = mean(cabezon$larvae_100m3, na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_mean = mean(est, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Note: Tweedie is single-component — binomial calibration and gamma plots are skipped

#---- A1.b. Predicted vs. observed
plot(pred_obs_tw$est, cabezon$larvae_100m3,
     xlab = "Predicted", ylab = "Observed",
     main = "Raw scale — cab_fit2 Tweedie")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

plot(log1p(pred_obs_tw$est), log1p(cabezon$larvae_100m3),
     xlab = "log(Predicted + 1)", ylab = "log(Observed + 1)",
     main = "Log scale — cab_fit2 Tweedie")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

#---- A1.c. Randomized quantile residuals
rq_res_tw <- residuals(cab_fit2, type = "mle-mvn")

qqnorm(rq_res_tw, main = "QQ — cab_fit2 Tweedie")
qqline(rq_res_tw)

pred_obs_tw$rq_resid <- rq_res_tw

ggplot(pred_obs_tw, aes(x = X, y = Y, color = rq_resid)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient2() +
  facet_wrap(~ year) +
  labs(title = "Spatial residuals — cab_fit2 Tweedie")

#---- A1.d. Temporal calibration
pred_obs_tw %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    obs  = mean(larvae_100m3),
    pred = mean(est)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = obs), color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred), color = "blue", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Temporal calibration — cab_fit2 Tweedie")

#---- A1.e. Annual RQ distributions
pred_obs_tw %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  mutate(med_resid = median(rq_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = rq_resid)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.6, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(x = as.numeric(factor(year)), y = rq_resid),
    method = "loess", span = 0.4,
    se = TRUE, color = "firebrick", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "RQ Residual",
       title = "Annual RQ Residual Distributions — cab_fit2 Tweedie") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 7))

#---- A1.f. CUSUM
pred_obs_tw %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(cusum = cumsum(med_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = cusum)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Cumulative Sum of Median RQ Residual",
       title = "CUSUM — cab_fit2 Tweedie") +
  theme_minimal()

#---- A1.g. Abundance index: observed station grid
pred_grid_obs_tw <- cabezon %>%
  dplyr::select(X, Y, year) %>%
  distinct()

cab_map_obs_tw  <- predict(cab_fit2,
                           newdata = pred_grid_obs_tw,
                           return_tmb_object = TRUE)
cab_index_obs_tw <- get_index(cab_map_obs_tw, area = 5^2, bias_correct = TRUE)

ggplot(cab_index_obs_tw, aes(x = year, y = est)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(y = "Estimated abundance index", x = "Year",
       title = "Abundance Index: Observed Station Grid — cab_fit2 Tweedie")



#---- 7.7. cab_fit2 TWEEDIE — STAR COMPARISONS & CCFs
combined_tw <- cab_index_obs_tw %>%
  dplyr::select(year, est) %>%
  rename(larvae_index = est) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_SSB %>% rename(ssb = value, ssb_lo = lo, ssb_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_recdevs %>% rename(rec_dev = value, rec_dev_lo = lo, rec_dev_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_age0 %>% rename(age0 = value, age0_lo = lo, age0_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  )

combined_tw_obs <- combined_tw %>%
  filter(!is.na(larvae_index))

#---- A1.a. Pooled CCFs
ccf(combined_tw_obs$larvae_index, combined_tw_obs$age0,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Tweedie Larval Index vs. Age-0 Recruits")

ccf(combined_tw_obs$larvae_index, combined_tw_obs$rec_dev,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Tweedie Larval Index vs. Recruitment Deviations")

ccf(combined_tw_obs$larvae_index, combined_tw_obs$ssb,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Tweedie Larval Index vs. SSB (raw)")

larvae_detrended_tw <- residuals(lm(larvae_index ~ year, data = combined_tw_obs))
ssb_detrended_tw    <- residuals(lm(ssb ~ year,          data = combined_tw_obs))

ccf(larvae_detrended_tw, ssb_detrended_tw,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Tweedie Larval Index vs. SSB (detrended)")

#---- A1.STAR.b. Breakpoint analysis
cusum_tw <- pred_obs_tw %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year)

lm_tw  <- lm(med_resid ~ year, data = cusum_tw)
seg_tw <- segmented(lm_tw, seg.Z = ~year, npsi = 1)
summary(seg_tw)
confint(seg_tw)
```

# A2. ALTERNATIVE MODEL — cab_fit03

```{r A2. cab_fit03, eval = F}
#---- A2. cab_fit03 DG Fixed Year / IID — Diagnostics & Abundance Index
#---- A2.a. Calibration summaries
pred_obs_iid <- predict(cab_fit03, type = "response")

pred_obs_iid %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean      = mean(cabezon$larvae_100m3, na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_mean     = mean(est, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs_occ       = mean(cabezon$larvae_100m3 > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_occ      = mean(est1, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs_pos_mean  = mean(cabezon$larvae_100m3[cabezon$larvae_100m3 > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_pos_mean = mean(est2, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

pred_obs_iid$presence <- cabezon$larvae_100m3 > 0
calibration_summary_iid <- pred_obs_iid %>%
  mutate(prob_bin = cut(est1, breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1))) %>%
  group_by(prob_bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_pred = mean(est1), observed = mean(presence), n = n())

plot(calibration_summary_iid$mean_pred, calibration_summary_iid$observed,
     xlab = "Predicted presence probability",
     ylab = "Observed presence frequency",
     main = "Binomial calibration — cab_fit03 DG IID")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

#---- A2.b. Predicted vs. observed
plot(pred_obs_iid$est, cabezon$larvae_100m3,
     xlab = "Predicted", ylab = "Observed",
     main = "Raw scale — cab_fit03 DG IID")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

plot(log1p(pred_obs_iid$est), log1p(cabezon$larvae_100m3),
     xlab = "log(Predicted + 1)", ylab = "log(Observed + 1)",
     main = "Log scale — cab_fit03 DG IID")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

pos_idx_iid <- cabezon$larvae_100m3 > 0
plot(log(pred_obs_iid$est2[pos_idx_iid]), log(cabezon$larvae_100m3[pos_idx_iid]),
     xlab = "log(Predicted positive abundance)",
     ylab = "log(Observed positive abundance)",
     main = "Gamma component — cab_fit03 DG IID")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

#---- A2.c. Randomized quantile residuals
rq_res_iid <- residuals(cab_fit03, type = "mle-mvn")

qqnorm(rq_res_iid, main = "QQ — cab_fit03 DG IID")
qqline(rq_res_iid)

pred_obs_iid$rq_resid <- rq_res_iid

ggplot(pred_obs_iid, aes(x = X, y = Y, color = rq_resid)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient2() +
  facet_wrap(~ year) +
  labs(title = "Spatial residuals — cab_fit03 DG IID")

#---- A2.d. Temporal calibration
pred_obs_iid %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    obs  = mean(larvae_100m3),
    pred = mean(est)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = obs), color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred), color = "blue", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Temporal calibration — cab_fit03 DG IID")

#---- A2.e. Annual RQ distributions
pred_obs_iid %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  mutate(med_resid = median(rq_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = rq_resid)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.6, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(x = as.numeric(factor(year)), y = rq_resid),
    method = "loess", span = 0.4,
    se = TRUE, color = "firebrick", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "RQ Residual",
       title = "Annual RQ Residual Distributions — cab_fit03 DG IID") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 7))

#---- A2.f. CUSUM
pred_obs_iid %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(cusum = cumsum(med_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = cusum)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Cumulative Sum of Median RQ Residual",
       title = "CUSUM — cab_fit03 DG IID") +
  theme_minimal()

#---- A2.g. Abundance index: observed station grid
pred_grid_obs_iid <- cabezon %>%
  dplyr::select(X, Y, year) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(fyear = as.factor(year))

cab_map_obs_iid  <- predict(cab_fit03,
                            newdata = pred_grid_obs_iid,
                            return_tmb_object = TRUE)
cab_index_obs_iid <- get_index(cab_map_obs_iid, area = 5^2, bias_correct = TRUE)

ggplot(cab_index_obs_iid, aes(x = year, y = est)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(y = "Estimated abundance index", x = "Year",
       title = "Abundance Index: Observed Station Grid — cab_fit03 DG IID")


#---- A2.STAR. cab_fit03 DG IID — STAR COMPARISONS & CCFs
combined_iid <- cab_index_obs_iid %>%
  dplyr::select(year, est) %>%
  rename(larvae_index = est) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_SSB %>% rename(ssb = value, ssb_lo = lo, ssb_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_recdevs %>% rename(rec_dev = value, rec_dev_lo = lo, rec_dev_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    STAR_age0 %>% rename(age0 = value, age0_lo = lo, age0_hi = hi),
    by = "year"
  )

combined_iid_obs <- combined_iid %>%
  filter(!is.na(larvae_index))

#---- A2.STAR.a. Pooled CCFs
ccf(combined_iid_obs$larvae_index, combined_iid_obs$age0,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: DG IID Larval Index vs. Age-0 Recruits")

ccf(combined_iid_obs$larvae_index, combined_iid_obs$rec_dev,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: DG IID Larval Index vs. Recruitment Deviations")

ccf(combined_iid_obs$larvae_index, combined_iid_obs$ssb,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: DG IID Larval Index vs. SSB (raw)")

larvae_detrended_iid <- residuals(lm(larvae_index ~ year, data = combined_iid_obs))
ssb_detrended_iid    <- residuals(lm(ssb ~ year,          data = combined_iid_obs))

ccf(larvae_detrended_iid, ssb_detrended_iid,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: DG IID Larval Index vs. SSB (detrended)")

#---- A2.STAR.b. Breakpoint analysis
cusum_iid <- pred_obs_iid %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year)

lm_iid  <- lm(med_resid ~ year, data = cusum_iid)
seg_iid <- segmented(lm_iid, seg.Z = ~year, npsi = 1)
summary(seg_iid)
confint(seg_iid)
```


# A3. EXPERIMENTS

```{r A3. Experiments, eval = F}

# RQ residuals for full AR1 spatiotemporal model
pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  mutate(med_resid = median(rq_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = rq_resid)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.6, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(x = as.numeric(factor(year)), y = rq_resid),
    method  = "loess", span = 0.4,
    se      = TRUE, color = "firebrick", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "RQ Residual",
    title = "Annual RQ Residual Distributions — cab_fit1"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 7))

pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(cusum = cumsum(med_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = cusum)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  labs(
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "Cumulative Sum of Median RQ Residual",
    title = "CUSUM — cab_fit1"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# RQ residuals for spatial only, fixed effects model
pred_obs_sp %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  mutate(med_resid = median(rq_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = rq_resid)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.6, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(x = as.numeric(factor(year)), y = rq_resid),
    method  = "loess", span = 0.4,
    se      = TRUE, color = "firebrick", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "RQ Residual",
    title = "Annual RQ Residual Distributions — cab_fit01"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 7))


pred_obs_sp %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(cusum = cumsum(med_resid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = cusum)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  labs(
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "Cumulative Sum of Median RQ Residual",
    title = "CUSUM — cab_fit01"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#---- Are there any meaningful breakpoints in our time-series to inform segmented regression analysis?

# Build the annual median series for each model
cusum_sp <- pred_obs_sp %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year)

cusum_ar1 <- pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(med_resid = median(rq_resid), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year)

# Fit a linear base model, then let segmented find the breakpoint
# Spatial model — one breakpoint
lm_sp  <- lm(med_resid ~ year, data = cusum_sp)
seg_sp <- segmented(lm_sp, seg.Z = ~year, npsi = 1)
summary(seg_sp)
confint(seg_sp)  # confidence interval on the breakpoint location

# AR1 model — two breakpoints
lm_ar1  <- lm(med_resid ~ year, data = cusum_ar1)
seg_ar1 <- segmented(lm_ar1, seg.Z = ~year, npsi = 2)
summary(seg_ar1)
confint(seg_ar1)


bp_sp <- round(seg_sp$psi[, "Est."])  # extract estimated breakpoint

run_era_ccf <- function(df, ss_var, start_yr, end_yr, lag.max = 10) {
  sub <- df %>% filter(year >= start_yr, year <= end_yr) %>% arrange(year)
  cat("Era:", start_yr, "–", end_yr, "| n rows:", nrow(sub), "\n")
  print(sub %>% dplyr::select(year, larvae_index, all_of(ss_var)))
  ccf(sub$larvae_index, sub[[ss_var]], lag.max = lag.max,
      main = paste0("CCF: ", start_yr, "–", end_yr, " | ", ss_var))
}

# AR1 model: three eras
bp1 <- round(seg_ar1$psi[1, "Est."])
bp2 <- round(seg_ar1$psi[2, "Est."])

str(combined_obs)

run_era_ccf(combined_obs, "rec_dev", 1981, bp1 - 1)
run_era_ccf(combined_obs, "rec_dev", bp1,  bp2 - 1)
run_era_ccf(combined_obs, "rec_dev", bp2,  2015)

#---- Simple lagged regression at -1 to check

combined_lagged <- combined_obs %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    age0_lead1 = lead(age0, 1),
    rec_dev_lead1 = lead(rec_dev, 1)
  )

lm_age0 <- lm(age0_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = combined_lagged)
lm_recdev <- lm(rec_dev_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = combined_lagged)

summary(lm_age0)
summary(lm_recdev)

combined_lagged %>%
  filter(!is.na(age0_lead1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = larvae_index, y = age0_lead1, label = year)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(nudge_y = 8, size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = T) +
  labs(x = "Larval Index (year t)", y = "Age-0 Recruits (year t+1)") +
  theme_minimal()

combined_lagged_no83 <- combined_lagged %>% filter(year != 1983)

lm_age0_no83 <- lm(age0_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = combined_lagged_no83)
summary(lm_age0_no83)

lm_age0_detrend   <- lm(age0_lead1    ~ larvae_index + year, data = combined_lagged)
lm_recdev_detrend <- lm(rec_dev_lead1 ~ larvae_index + year, data = combined_lagged)

summary(lm_age0_detrend)
summary(lm_recdev_detrend)

plot(lm_age0, which = 4)  # Cook's distance plot

# Remove the three most visually anomalous years
combined_lagged_trimmed <- combined_lagged %>% 
  filter(!year %in% c(1983, 1986, 2001))

lm_age0_trimmed <- lm(age0_lead1 ~ larvae_index, data = combined_lagged_trimmed)
summary(lm_age0_trimmed)
```

# A4. EXTRAS

```{r A4. Extras, error = TRUE, eval = F}

world <- ne_coastline(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

# ── In-sample predictions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Delta-Gamma: est1 = occurrence prob, est2 = positive catch rate, combined = est1 * est2
pred_dg <- predict(cab_fit1, type = "response")
pred_dg$est_combined <- pred_dg$est1 * pred_dg$est2

# Tweedie: est is the combined expected value in response scale
pred_tw <- predict(cab_fit2, type = "response")

# Attach predicted values to observed data
obs_dg <- cabezon %>% mutate(predicted = pred_dg$est_combined, observed = larvae_100m3)
obs_tw <- cabezon %>% mutate(predicted = pred_tw$est,           observed = larvae_100m3)

# ── Grid predictions for spatial maps ─────────────────────────────────────────

# Delta-Gamma (cab_map already exists; add combined column)
cab_map_df <- cab_map$data %>%
  mutate(est_combined = est1 * est2)

plot_spatial_fit(cab_map_df, "est_combined", cabezon, "Delta-Gamma")

# Tweedie grid predictions
cab_map_tw <- predict(cab_fit2, newdata = pred_grid, type = "response")

# ── 1. Predicted vs. Observed scatter plots ───────────────────────────────────

scatter_dg <- ggplot(obs_dg, aes(x = predicted, y = observed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Delta-Gamma: Predicted vs. Observed",
    x = expression("Predicted larvae per 100 m"^3),
    y = expression("Observed larvae per 100 m"^3)
  ) +
  theme_bw()

scatter_tw <- ggplot(obs_tw, aes(x = predicted, y = observed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Tweedie: Predicted vs. Observed",
    x = expression("Predicted larvae per 100 m"^3),
    y = expression("Observed larvae per 100 m"^3)
  ) +
  theme_bw()

scatter_dg
scatter_tw

# ── 2. Faceted spatial maps: predicted surface + observed points ───────────────

plot_spatial_fit <- function(grid_preds, est_col, obs_data, model_name) {
  ggplot() +
    geom_raster(
      data = grid_preds,
      aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, fill = log1p(.data[[est_col]])),
      interpolate = TRUE
    ) +
    geom_sf(data = world, color = "gray30", fill = "gray85", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_point(
      data = obs_data,
      aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, size = log1p(larvae_100m3)),
      shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "black", stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.75
    ) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(
      name = expression(log(1 + hat(y))),
      option = "plasma",
      na.value = NA
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(
      name = expression(log(1 + y)),
      range = c(0.3, 3.5)
    ) +
    coord_sf(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits, expand = FALSE) +
    facet_wrap(~ year) +
    labs(title = paste(model_name, "— Predicted Surface & Observed Points")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
    theme(
      strip.text     = element_text(size = 7),
      axis.text      = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.title   = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.key.height = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
}

plot_spatial_fit(cab_map_df, "est_combined", cabezon, "Delta-Gamma")
plot_spatial_fit(cab_map_tw, "est",          cabezon, "Tweedie")

```
